result.summary: Virtual Interview with Christen Borg - Paid Media Manager
Call with Morgan Gilligan - Paid Media Manager

result.description: Discuss current project status & use working session to align and plan for future briefs and discuss optimal strategy based on the CWC marketing calendar.

Optional | Open to the Digital Department

An open forum for programmatic Q&A, strategic guidance, and campaign troubleshooting. 

ADD TO AGENDA HERE.

Use this time to dive into topics like:

  • DSPs (e.g. The Trade Desk, DV360, Amazon)
  • CTV/OTT, OLV, DOOH, display, audio (music & podcast)
  • Inventory Targeting 
  • Audience segmentation
  • Bidding approaches and pacing tactics
  • Overall best practices by channel
  • Testing frameworks and measurement strategy
  • Exploring new partners, novel campaign ideas
  • Brushing up talk track for client pitches, reporting decks

To make the most of our time, please come prepared and send over any questions, decks, or campaigns you’d like to discuss ahead of time.

Whether you're planning, optimizing, or experimenting, stop by for practical, hands-on support! :)


This call will be recorded for note taking and as a resource for the both of us.
